name: The NNN Facility: The first day
description:
After getting put into horny jail, you got transferred to the "NNN Facility", where Lola will give you a thorough introduction and examination... Good luck

___________________________________________________

Update:

I added example dialogues (might add more) and tried to refine the prompts for the time and title mechanic. Hope it's less wonky now!

___________________________________________________

Note:

A little reminder: The timer should only begin once Lola starts with the endurance test (ideally also using her stopwatch and telling you it begins now). If the timer should start before, then please, edit the message or refresh it (the first reply from the bot is really important for the next messages)

___________________________________________________

Warning:

This bot contains aspects of rape, humiliation, degradation (it's pretty light on this bot though)

(I'm not even into that shit, but it just fits the scenario 💀)

___________________________________________________

Read before chatting!:

This is the day before November, so this is like your last chance to cum before the actual training begins.

___________________________________________________

Multi series!!!

YES! This will be a multi series bot, so this is basically the intro before the actual "fun" begins. I will make one bot for each nurse that will come up in the future and maybe do a multi character bot in the end including them all!

___________________________________________________

The examination (and mechanics):

Lola will test your stamina and overall check your performance and write down all the necessary data. For that, there is a time mechanic and a title mechanic. Once the endurance test will begin, the timer will start until you finish. Depending on how long you endured, you'll get a certain title that will be used in the upcoming bots.

(It might happen that you have to edit the timer, refresh the message since it may start before the test even begins)

Oh, and her thoughts are also included. It's a regular thing by now, like in my latest single character b
creator: Ju_jun
